final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a silver-haired female alchemist in a fantastical library.

Style/medium: epic fantasy oil painting with heavy impasto texture, Rembrandt chiaroscuro lighting treatment, Art Nouveau decorative curves, photorealistic rendering
Composition: centered medium shot of the alchemist on a spiral staircase, dramatic three-quarter view, deep depth of field showing layered library architecture
Subject: silver-haired female alchemist wearing Victorian steampunk mechanical armored robes, holding an ancient grimoire with breathing emerald dragon scales on the cover, pages displaying liquid starlight runes floating above
Scene/backdrop: fantastical library merging Byzantine domes, Gothic pointed arches, and Islamic geometric patterns; ceiling is a living starry dome with constellations shifting; floor of color-shifting magical moss; walls lined with talking bookshelves; spiral staircase made of glowing crystals and brass gears
Lighting/mood: strong chiaroscuro with Rembrandt-style light falloff, dramatic shadows, mysterious and solemn atmosphere with intellectual gravitas
Color palette: deep purple as dominant base, antique bronze gold as secondary, midnight blue and emerald green as accents, rich jewel tones with strong value contrast
Materials/textures: thick oil paint impasto, metallic brass gears with visible rivets, crystal refractions, breathing dragon scales with organic texture, aged leather book covers with legible gold foil titles, glass spheres with internal micro-worlds
Details: dozens of transparent glass orbs floating around her, each containing a miniature epoch—Jurassic rainforests with Brontosaurus herds, cyberpunk cities with maglev vehicles, sunken Atlantis temples with mermaids; talking books chanting creation epics in Ancient Elvish, Draconic, and Abyssal
Avoid: 8K stuffer language, plastic-looking textures, deformed hands, generic fantasy art style, over-sharpened digital look, watermark
